name: CodeT5+ 16B
archDisplay: Encoder-decoder (shallow encoder / deep decoder), initialized from CodeGen-350M-mono encoder + CodeGen-16B-mono decoder
note: Encoder-decoder code LLM family (220M-16B); InstructCodeT5+ 16B tuned variant hit open-source SOTA HumanEval pass@1 in 2023 (non-commercial license)
verificationNotes: Confirmed real: arxiv 2305.07922 (submitted 2023-05-13) and HF repo Salesforce/codet5p-16b exist. Fetched ar5iv paper directly and confirmed base CodeT5+ 16B scores exactly 30.9 pass@1 / 51.6 pass@10 on HumanEval (distinct from the higher-scoring InstructCodeT5+ 16B variant at 35.0/54.5, which the record correctly does not conflate). License BSD-3-Clause confirmed on HF.
